The '''Multi-Utility Transport (MUT)''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle and larger version of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|Multi-Troop Transport]].

==Characteristics==
The Multi-Utility Transport was manufactured by [[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]]. The MUT's design recall heavy [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]]-dwelling charging creatures: its heavily armored fore section can withstand great impacts, allowing it to ram an enemy building and unload it carried [[Troop/Legends|troops]] behind enemy lines. MUT can carry up a company of 112 [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] in stowed configuration with its detachable hydraulically powered deployment rack. The MUT was well-protected with its thick armor with four forwarded-mounted anti-personnel [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] in addition.<ref name="SWTCW:PG" />

==History==
The MUT was first seen in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], but a [[Trade Federation Troop Transport|similar-looking model]] that shared more of a resemblance to the original MTT design (though it had the MUT's "wings") was known to have operated slightly earlier on, as it was encountered by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] when she investigated the Trade Federation's presence in the [[Karthakk system]].

The MUT saw action on [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]], [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]], and [[Thule/Legends|Thule]] during the [[Dark Reaper crisis]], where they were generally part of large convoys protected by [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]], [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|Single Trooper Aerial Platforms]], and [[Ground Armored Tank]]s. They had a very low ground speed, suggesting that they could carry large amounts of cargo but were not very fast when doing so.
